utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So Chandler , have you heard about Monica secret boyfriend ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Uhh , yeah . She uh , she uh , she uh might have mentioned him .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So Mon , when are we gonna meet this new secret waiter man ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ohh , he is really shy . I ... I do not think he is up to meeting everyone yet .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , I do not think he is up to meeting everyone yet .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I do not care ! I wanna meet this guy who the best sex she ever had !

emotion_cause.span: 6_I wanna meet this guy who the best sex she ever had !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Really ? ! That is what you heard ? You said that ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_That is what you heard ? You said that ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I might have said that . Why is that funny ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Because I am very happy for him ! And you ! You lucky dog !
